LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT VIVIAN ZHAI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 5, 2013, TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE OPPOSING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF ITS OPPOSITION PAPERS BY MAY 17, 2013, WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: PETER BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT VIVIAN ZHAI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. THE MOTION IS TIMELY AND DEFENDANT PROVIDES A PROPOSED PLEADING. GIVEN THE LIBERAL POLICY OF HEARING CASES ON THE MERITS, DEFENDANT DEMONSTRATES EXCUSABLE NEGLECT FOR NOT RESPONDING TO THE COMPLAINT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: L. FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Continued To Sep-18-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jun-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT VIVIAN ZHAI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted. The motion is timely and defendant provides a proposed pleading. Given the liberal policy of hearing cases on the merits, defendant demonstrates excusable neglect for not responding to the complaint. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: L. Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar May-03-2013 Continued To Jun-05-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT VIVIAN ZHAI's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is continued to June 5, 2013, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall provide a courtesy copy of its opposition papers by May 17, 2013, with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court has the moving and reply papers. Judge: Peter Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
